𝗦𝗠𝗔𝗥𝗧-𝗠𝗢𝗡𝗘𝗬-𝗖𝗢𝗡𝗖𝗘𝗣𝗧𝗦 | To provide traders with Python-based tools to implement and backtest algorithmic trading strategies using Smart Money Concepts (SMC) and ICT methodologies.  🔍 Worth a Look

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide traders with Python-based tools to implement and backtest algorithmic trading strategies using Smart Money Concepts (SMC) and ICT methodologies.
📅 Created: Sep 2023 • Updated: Mar 2026

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Fair Value Gap (FVG) indicator
✅ Swing Highs and Lows detection
✅ Break of Structure (BOS) and Change of Character (CHoCH) indicators
✅ Order Blocks (OB) detection
✅ Designed for algorithmic trading strategies
✅ Inspired by ICT concepts


✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.4K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 655 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 17 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This Python package implements Inner Circle Trader (ICT) smart money concepts for algorithmic trading. It provides a suite of indicators like Order Blocks, Liquidity, Fair Value Gaps, and market structure breaks to help traders analyze market sentiment and identify potential trading opportunities.

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/joshyattridge/smart-money-concepts

𝗣𝗬𝗧𝗘𝗥𝗠𝗚𝗨𝗜 | Developing complex, visually appealing, and interactive terminal user interfaces with ease.  🔥 Super Hot!

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Developing complex, visually appealing, and interactive terminal user interfaces with ease.
📅 Created: Mar 2021 • Updated: Mar 2026

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Modular widget system
✅ Mouse support
✅ Customizable and rapid terminal markup language (TIM)
✅ YAML or Python-based styling engines
✅ Desktop-inspired window manager system
✅ SVG and HTML screenshots of terminal output


✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 2.6K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 63 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 9 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

PyTermGUI is a Python framework for building rich and interactive terminal user interfaces (TUIs). It offers a modular widget system, mouse support, and a customizable markup language for styling text, enabling the creation of desktop-like applications within the terminal.

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Automating the process of filling and managing data within PDF forms using Python.
📅 Created: Oct 2020 • Updated: Mar 2026

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Inspect PDF form fields
✅ Fill PDF forms using Python dictionaries
✅ Create new form fields on PDFs
✅ Extract pages from PDFs
✅ Merge multiple PDF documents

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

PyPDFForm is a Python library designed for automating PDF form interactions. It allows users to programmatically inspect, fill, and create form fields within PDF documents, simplifying form processing tasks.

𝗖𝗨𝗥𝗦𝗢𝗥-𝗖𝗟𝗜𝗣 | To provide users with a visually intuitive and dynamically positioned clipboard history manager on Wayland compositors, enhancing productivity and clipboard management.  🔥 Super Hot!

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🦀 Rust 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide users with a visually intuitive and dynamically positioned clipboard history manager on Wayland compositors, enhancing productivity and clipboard management.
📅 Created: Sep 2025 • Updated: Mar 2026

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Windows 11-style clipboard history
✅ Dynamic positioning at cursor location
✅ Native GNOME/Libadwaita design
✅ Advanced Wayland integration (Layer Shell Protocol, Cursor Tracking)
✅ Multi-output and Multi-input support
✅ Automatic clipboard monitoring and content classification (text, URLs, code, files, images)
✅ Quick selection, pin, and delete history items


✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

⭐⭐ 64 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 5 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 2 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Cursor Clip is a modern Wayland clipboard manager built with Rust and GTK4, offering a Windows 11-style clipboard history that dynamically positions itself at the mouse cursor. It integrates seamlessly with the GNOME design language and Wayland protocols for reliable clipboard handling.

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿
